atom_resolution_rule.answer: they contain an atom-level x2 witness, atom 7, but the carrier-mask contact also contains an x5 co-witness, atom 19
atom_resolution_rule.question: whether the mixed x2/x5 first contacts that support the zero-overhead aperture cycles can be read as pure x2
atom_resolution_rule.quotient_boundary: without adding an atom selector, carrier-mask edges 39 and 41 remain intrinsically mixed x2/x5 contacts
